claim: Use Pydantic AI with DeepSeek V3 through OpenRouter for cost-effective, powerful AI agents that rival enterprise solutions
actionable: Replace expensive LLM APIs in agent workflows with DeepSeek V3 via OpenRouter's API gateway, requiring only URL override in Pydantic AI model config
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: Prototype agent workflows with no-code tools (n8n) before coding to clarify architecture and reduce implementation complexity
actionable: Build a no-code prototype first using tools like n8n to define agent structure, then download the workflow JSON and use it as a blueprint for coding the production version
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: Use @agent.tool decorator in Pydantic AI to instantly convert Python functions into callable LLM tools without extensive boilerplate
actionable: Add @agent.tool decorator above any Python function with a comprehensive docstring; the LLM will use docstring to understand when and how to invoke the tool
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: AI coding assistants (Cursor, Windsurf) excel at writing tool implementations when given workflow context from a no-code prototype
actionable: Paste your n8n workflow JSON into Cursor/Windsurf with instructions to 'build this function for this tool in my Pydantic agent' to generate production-ready code
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: Maintain conversation history in agents by including both user messages and tool call results to prevent redundant API calls
actionable: When building agent loops, save not just user/AI messages but also tool call requests and responses to conversation history so the LLM can reference prior results
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: Pydantic AI has built-in retry logic for handling transient API errors like rate limiting without manual intervention
actionable: Enable Pydantic AI's retry configuration in agent setup to automatically retry failed LLM calls due to rate limits or transient failures
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo

claim: Use system prompts that clearly define agent behavior; copy exact prompts from working no-code prototypes to save iteration time
actionable: Extract and reuse the system message from your n8n prototype directly in your Pydantic AI agent initialization to maintain consistency
source_title: Pydantic AI + DeepSeek V3 - The BEST AI Agent Combo
